name: Space Duck: Escape
short_description: Collect equipment and climb upwards to assist Puddles the Duck escape from an erupting volcanic planet in this fast paced rogue-lite vertical platformer. Move quickly to avoid the rising lava flows to help this Space Duck Escape!
detailed_description:
Collect equipment and climb upwards to assist Puddles the Duck escape from an erupting volcanic planet in this fast paced rogue-lite vertical platformer. Move quickly to avoid the rising lava flows to help this Space Duck Escape!

Run Based Gameplay

Every new run will chose a random set of 9 layers to complete. Every layer introduces a new obstacle to deal with and a new piece of equipment that can assist in clearing those obstacles. While technically possible to complete a run without any equipment, you'll find yourself wanting them as the obstacles combine and increase difficulty.

Unique Interactions

You can equip 2 active and 1 passive for any run. With 9 total unique pieces of equipment, choose wisely to make the best use of your load out!

Save Files

Your save file will keep track of your best runs and other stats to keep you trying to improve your run times!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese
